news.t: BMO Announces Upcoming Reverse Splits of Six Series of its Exchange Traded Notes (NYSE Arca: BERZ, BNKD, DULL, FLYD, NRGD and OILD)

holdings.infoBox: BERZ is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 9.07%, Advanced Micro Devices at 8.08%, Intel at 7.67%, AppLovin at 6.64%, and Apple at 6.49%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors Solactive FANG & Innovation - 3X Inverse Leveraged ETN (BERZ) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the Solactive FANG Innovation index. The fund tracks 300% inverse of the daily price movements of an equal-weighted index of US-listed technology companies. BERZ was launched on Aug 20, 2021 and is issued by REX Microsectors.

data.text: NEW YORK, Feb. 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - Bank of Montreal ("BMO") today announced that it will be implementing reverse splits of six series of its outstanding Exchange Traded Notes listed in the table b...
